---
description: Fill this template before invoking the Certificate agent. All fields are required unless marked optional. The agent will not start implementation without a complete specification.
---

# Certificate Specification

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **PDF type** | `TEMPLATE` or `GENERAL` |
| **Available on 1177** | `true` or `false` |
| **Certificate type** | e.g., `FK7804` |
| **Activation date** | e.g., `2024-06-01` |
| **Version** | e.g., `V2` — leave blank for a new certificate |

---

## Description Texts

**Text innan val av intyg** (maps to `description`):
> [paste exact text from spec]

**Text efter val av intyg** (maps to `detailedDescription`):
> [paste exact text from spec]
